evals.prompt: Build a forecast for my team this quarter. Quota is $2M. We've closed $800k so far. Commit pipeline is $600k across 4 deals. Best case is $400k across 3 deals. Total open pipeline is $1.8M. Average cycle is 45 days and we have 6 weeks left in the quarter.
evals.expected_output: A complete forecast model with weighted values showing the expected outcome range, pipeline coverage analysis (1.8M pipeline on 1.2M remaining = 1.5x coverage which is thin), and a gap plan since even best case may not hit quota. Should include deal-level inspection recommendations for commit deals.

assertions.name: has_forecast_model
assertions.description: Includes a forecast model table with categories, weighted values, and scenario analysis

assertions.name: has_coverage_analysis
assertions.description: Calculates pipeline coverage ratio and flags it against benchmarks

assertions.name: identifies_gap
assertions.description: Identifies the gap to quota and provides a gap plan with specific levers

assertions.name: has_scenarios
assertions.description: Presents worst case, most likely, and best case scenarios with dollar values

evals.prompt: I need to validate my commit number for the forecast call tomorrow. I have $500k in commit but my manager thinks it should be lower. Here are my commit deals: Deal A ($200k, negotiation stage, strong champion, close date this month), Deal B ($150k, proposal stage, no EB meeting yet, close date in 3 weeks), Deal C ($150k, demo stage, verbal interest only, close date end of month).
evals.expected_output: Deal-level inspection of all three commit deals, with Deal A likely staying in commit, Deal B recommended to move to best case (no EB), and Deal C recommended to move to pipeline (only demo stage with verbal interest). Adjusted commit should be around $200-350k.

assertions.name: inspects_each_deal
assertions.description: Evaluates each deal individually with risk flags and confidence level

assertions.name: recommends_recategorization
assertions.description: Recommends moving at least one deal out of commit with specific reasoning

assertions.name: has_adjusted_forecast
assertions.description: Provides an adjusted commit number based on the deal-level analysis

evals.prompt: My pipeline coverage is 2x and I need 4x. I have 8 weeks to build pipeline for next quarter. What's my gap plan?
evals.expected_output: A gap plan with specific levers to double pipeline coverage in 8 weeks. Should include pull-in opportunities, outbound blitz planning, expansion plays, and partner sourcing with realistic timelines and contribution estimates for each lever.

assertions.name: has_gap_plan_table
assertions.description: Includes a gap plan table with levers, potential value, specific actions, and timelines

assertions.name: is_time_realistic
assertions.description: Actions and timelines are realistic for an 8-week window

assertions.name: has_specific_actions
assertions.description: Recommends specific, actionable steps per lever — not generic advice like 'do more outbound'
